lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several minor scratches and a few small dents. The interior shows visible wear from regular use, including some fading on the seats. The car is functional and runs as expected.
Mint condition.

Looking for a dependable vehicle that's ready to tackle your daily commute? This car has plenty of life left and offers a solid, functional ride for anyone on a budget! It shows its history with some visible wear and tear, but it remains a reliable choice for getting from A to B. If you're looking for a practical, honest car at a great price, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive repairs to be roadworthy. The engine runs roughly with a heavy oil leak and a noticeable knock, while the transmission slips consistently between gears. Externally, there is significant rust on the wheel wells and several large dents on the passenger side. The interior shows heavy wear, including torn upholstery and a non-functional climate control system. This car is best suited as a parts donor or a major project for an experienced mechanic.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior paint retains a nice shine with only minor surface scratches and a few small stone chips consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is clean and free of major stains or tears, though some light wear is visible on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is sound; the engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts correctly, and all major electronics are functional. It has a consistent service history and is ready for its next owner without any immediate repairs needed.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The engine and transmission require significant repairs. The exterior has major body damage, rust, and paint failure. The interior is heavily worn with damage to the upholstery.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver. This unit demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and has been preserved to a high standard of aesthetic and functional care. Offering a sophisticated balance of performance and reliability, it stands as a testament to our commitment to quality inventory. We invite you to experience the refined driving dynamics of this distinguished selection.

Used vehicle. Good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of performance and long-term reliability. The exterior retains a high-gloss finish, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, while the body remains straight and structurally sound. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, with all upholstery preserved in great shape and every electronic feature—from the intuitive infotainment system to the crisp climate control—functioning perfectly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and delivers responsive power, backed by a comprehensive service history that ensures peace of mind. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a comfortable, composed ride. With plenty of tread left on the tires and firm, confident braking, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has undergone a rigorous inspection process to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a sophisticated balance of durability and value, this remains an exceptional choice for the professional driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber automotive investment.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It runs like a dream and is totally ready for its next big adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take it for a spin!

Offering a mechanically sorted E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS. Power is managed via a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox and a factory M-variable limited-slip differential. This example boasts a reinforced rear subframe and a recently serviced suspension with refreshed bushings for sharpened lateral dynamics. Documented maintenance includes the critical rod bearing replacement and recent valve clearances. While displaying honest wear consistent with a well-loved driver's car, the powertrain remains robust and the chassis is exceptionally balanced. A pure, analog experience for the discerning enthusiast.
Used vehicle in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable performance.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. It looks great and runs even better—perfect for someone looking for a dependable car without the brand-new price tag. I've taken great care of it, and I'd love to see it go to a good home. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Available now is a mechanically sound E92 BMW M3, featuring the iconic S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 engine. This high-revving powerplant utilizes individual throttle bodies to deliver 414 hp with a razor-sharp 8,400 RPM redline. Mated to a driver-centric 6-speed manual transmission, the drivetrain provides an engaging, tactile experience. Recent preventative maintenance addresses critical S65 concerns, including rod bearing replacement and new throttle body actuators. The chassis is equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and an M Variable Differential Lock, ensuring neutral handling and exceptional corner-exit traction. While showing minor signs of use, this M3 remains a performance-focused example with a rigid subframe and ventilated compound braking system ready for the spirited enthusiast.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Reliable performance. Clean title.

This meticulously maintained luxury sedan offers a refined driving experience and a complete service history that speaks to its reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though it shows minor, expected signs of road use like small stone chips on the lower valance. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of well-preserved leather and polished wood trim, with all electronic features—including the premium navigation system and heated seats—working exactly as they should. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, having just received a fresh oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. The tires are in great shape with plenty of miles left, and the brakes feel firm and responsive. This car has been smoke-free, pet-free, and garage-kept, making it an ideal choice for someone seeking quality and longevity without the new-car price tag. Sold with all original keys and documentation.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist.
